scheme.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Urban 2.0 (Interest Subsidy Scheme)
scheme.description: Improve affordable home ownership in urban India through subsidized home loans.

provider.name: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

benefits.name: Interest Subsidy
benefits.summary: 4% interest subsidy on the first ₹8 lakh of home loans up to ₹25 lakh for EWS, LIG, and MIG urban families.
benefits.calculation_logic: Subsidy calculated at 4% p.a. on a maximum principal of ₹8 lakh over a maximum tenure of 12 years.
benefits.loan_range: Loan up to ₹25 lakh, property value up to ₹35 lakh

documents.name: Aadhaar and PAN Cards
documents.description: Identity proof of applicant and family members

documents.name: Income Proof
documents.description: Salary slips, ITR, or income certificate showing annual household income up to ₹9 lakh

documents.name: Property Documents
documents.description: Sale agreement, approved plan, carpet area details <= 120 sq. m., property value <= ₹35 lakh

workflow.name: Check Eligibility & Apply
workflow.description: Register on JanSamarth, check eligibility, select lender, and submit online application.

workflow.name: Lender Sanction and Subsidy Credit
workflow.description: Lender evaluates property, approves loan, and processes interest subsidy which is credited directly to reduce principal outstanding.

metadata.notes: Applicant family must not own a pucca house anywhere in India. First-time urban home buyers.

suggested_faqs.question: What is the main objective of Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Urban 2.0 (Interest Subsidy Scheme)?
suggested_faqs.answer: The main objective is to provide assistance and support under Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Urban 2.0 (Interest Subsidy Scheme) to eligible beneficiaries.

suggested_faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Urban 2.0 (Interest Subsidy Scheme)?
suggested_faqs.answer: Businesses belonging to eligible categories in various sectors may apply.
